pattern: A digit dynamic program over the binary representation, leaning on Fibonacci counts of valid bit strings, counts integers up to n that never place two ones side by side.
hints: The number of length-L binary strings with no adjacent ones follows the Fibonacci sequence.
Process the bits of n from most significant to least, accumulating counts of valid numbers below n at each set bit.

Track the previous bit; when you see a one, add the Fibonacci count for the remaining lower positions, and stop early if two consecutive ones appear in n itself, finally adding one for n when it stays valid.

stress.description: random n within a range the brute force can verify quickly
